title: Sync Versions Generator
description: Synchronizes version placeholders in build output files with actual version numbers for library publishing

project.description: The name of the project to sync versions for (e.g., 'core', 'platform', 'cdk')
project.x-prompt: Which project do you want to sync versions for?

files.description: Glob patterns for files to sync. If not provided, uses the project's build output directory automatically.
